    • listAvailableEnrollments

      public AccountsListAvailableEnrollmentsRequestBuilder listAvailableEnrollments()
      List Available Enrollments

      Get a list of Enrollments available for an Account.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • listAvailableEnrollments

      public AccountsListAvailableEnrollmentsResponse listAvailableEnrollments(String accountId) throws Exception
      List Available Enrollments

      Get a list of Enrollments available for an Account.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listAvailableEnrollments

      public AccountsListAvailableEnrollmentsResponse listAvailableEnrollments(String accountId, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<String> filter, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Available Enrollments

      Get a list of Enrollments available for an Account.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      pageSize - The maximum number of available enrollments to return. The service may return fewer than this value. The maximum value is 100; values above 100 will be coerced to 100.
      pageToken - A page token, received from a previous `ListAvailableEnrollments` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.

      When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListAvailableEnrollments` must match the call that provided the page token.

      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; Filter options include: `enrollment_type`
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • accountsListAvailableEnrollmentsByAccountGroup

      public AccountsListAvailableEnrollments1RequestBuilder accountsListAvailableEnrollmentsByAccountGroup()
      List Available Enrollments (by Account Group)

      Get a list of Enrollments available for an Account.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • accountsListAvailableEnrollmentsByAccountGroup

      public AccountsListAvailableEnrollments1Response accountsListAvailableEnrollmentsByAccountGroup(String accountGroupId) throws Exception
      List Available Enrollments (by Account Group)

      Get a list of Enrollments available for an Account.

      Parameters:
      accountGroupId - The accountGroup id.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • accountsListAvailableEnrollmentsByAccountGroup

      public AccountsListAvailableEnrollments1Response accountsListAvailableEnrollmentsByAccountGroup(String accountGroupId, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<String> filter, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Available Enrollments (by Account Group)

      Get a list of Enrollments available for an Account.

      Parameters:
      accountGroupId - The accountGroup id.
      pageSize - The maximum number of available enrollments to return. The service may return fewer than this value. The maximum value is 100; values above 100 will be coerced to 100.
      pageToken - A page token, received from a previous `ListAvailableEnrollments` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.

      When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListAvailableEnrollments` must match the call that provided the page token.

      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; Filter options include: `enrollment_type`
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      List Account Enrollments

      Gets a list of Enrollments for an Account.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      pageSize - The maximum number of enrollments to return.
      pageToken - A page token, received from a previous `ListEnrollments` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.

      When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListEnrollments` must match the call that provided the page token.

      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listAgreements

      public AccountsListAgreementsResponse listAgreements(String accountId, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Account Agreements

      Gets a list of Agreements on an Account.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      pageSize - The maximum number of agreements to return.
      pageToken - A page token, received from a previous `ListAgreements` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.

      When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListAgreements` must match the call that provided the page token.

      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      public AccountsListEntitlementsResponse listEntitlements(String accountId, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Account Entitlements

      Gets a list of Entitlements for an Account.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      pageSize - The maximum number of entitlements to return.
      pageToken - A page token, received from a previous `ListEntitlements` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.

      When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListEntitlements` must match the call that provided the page token.

      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
